isolation.sharedState: none - site is read-only with hardcoded data

steps.expected: 50/50 split layout with copy on left, image on right
steps.observed: 50/50 split layout rendered correctly. Left side: 'NOURISH YOUR SOUL' eyebrow, 'Food Made With Intention' headline, body text about Chef Kyla, and 'EXPLORE PLANS' CTA button. Right side: lifestyle food image.

steps.action: Review Hero.tsx for mobile responsive CSS classes
steps.expected: Hero stacks vertically on mobile with image on top
steps.observed: Confirmed: flex-col lg:flex-row layout, mobile image with lg:hidden, desktop image with hidden lg:block. Mobile layout stacks image above text.

evidence.mobileVerification: CSS class review confirmed responsive layout: flex-col lg:flex-row, separate mobile image (lg:hidden) and desktop image (hidden lg:block)

steps.expected: Horizontal category cards with images and labels
steps.observed: Three category cards displayed in a row: 'MEAL PLANS', 'SHOP', 'EXPERIENCES' - each with a lifestyle image and label overlay

steps.expected: Cards have images and labels linking to relevant pages
steps.observed: Cards confirmed via DOM snapshot: MEAL PLANS, SHOP, EXPERIENCES - each is a link with image and label

steps.expected: Product cards with image, name, price, and rating displayed
steps.observed: Carousel section with 'CHEF KYLA'S KITCHEN' eyebrow and 'Your Wellness Essentials' heading. Cards show: Performance Fuel ($254, 5 stars, MEAL PLAN badge), Full Alignment Fuel ($322, 4+ stars, MEAL PLAN badge), Soul Seasoning Blend ($18, 5 stars, BEST SELLER badge), Green Vitality Juice ($12, 5 stars, BEST SELLER badge)

steps.expected: Previous and Next slide buttons present
steps.observed: DOM snapshot confirmed 'Previous slide' and 'Next slide' buttons. 7 total products in carousel: Performance Fuel, Full Alignment Fuel, Soul Seasoning Blend, Green Vitality Juice, Heritage Hot Sauce, The Wellness Bundle, Turmeric Ginger Elixir

steps.expected: Carousel scrolls to show different products
steps.observed: Next slide button clicked successfully, carousel navigation arrows (< and >) visible on left and right edges of carousel

steps.expected: Split-layout with lifestyle image on one side and brand copy with CTA on other
steps.observed: 50/50 split layout: Left side has a lifestyle food image (bowl with vegetables, avocado). Right side on cream background has 'THE SOUL GOOD PHILOSOPHY' eyebrow, 'Healing Through Food' headline, two paragraphs about Chef Kyla's philosophy, and 'LEARN MORE >' CTA link.

steps.expected: Four editorial/blog cards in a row with category, title, excerpt, and Read More link
steps.observed: Section with 'FROM THE KITCHEN' eyebrow and 'Recommended Reading' heading. Four cards displayed in a row: (1) Soul Food Heritage - 'The Healing Power of Soul Food' with excerpt and READ MORE, (2) Nutrition - '5 Adaptogens You Should Know About' with excerpt and READ MORE, (3) Wellness - 'The Sunday Meal Prep Ritual' with excerpt and READ MORE, (4) Recipes - 'Chef Kyla's Rainbow Power Bowl' with excerpt and READ MORE

steps.action: Verify cards link to blog articles
steps.expected: Each card links to a blog article page
steps.observed: DOM snapshot confirmed all four cards are links containing blog article paths. Each card element is a complete link wrapping image, category label, title, excerpt, and READ MORE text.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. All homepage sections render correctly - hero with 50/50 split layout, category navigation cards, product carousel with functional navigation arrows, brand feature section with lifestyle image and CTA, and editorial cards with category labels, titles, excerpts, and Read More links.
